name: Code Brown: A Game About Pooping
short_description: Warning! Code Brown! Somebody wants to crap but the only one toilet room is closed! Wait, what is it?.. Fine, that pan with a fresh soup will be acceptable.
detailed_description:
Warning! Code Brown! Somebody wants to crap but the only one toilet room is closed! Wait, what is it?.. Fine, that pan with a fresh soup will be acceptable.

You have to find some appropriate place and distract these people staying around. Now you can do what your stomach wanted as long as people can’t see you. But be careful – if you overdo it, you won’t have time to pull on your pants until people come back.

Features of gameplay

  • Destroy the reputation of the famous blogger;
  • Help the world wide famous politician to cheat children;
  • Put the annoying social justice warriors into mental hospital;
  • Fly to the Moon by church and prove to everyone that there is no God.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Turkish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
